title: Blink Charging Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Blink Charging Q2 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue Performance: Q2 2024 total revenue: $33.3 million versus $32.8 million in Q2 2023, H1 2024 revenue: $70.8 million, up 30% YoY, Service revenue: $8 million in Q2, up 15% YoY, Gross margin: 32.2% in Q2; 34% for H1 2024. Operational Highlights: Deployed 4,106 chargers globally in Q2, Dispersed nearly 33 gigawatts of energy across networks, 98,261 cumulative chargers deployed since inception, 6,094 Blink-owned units 25% YoY increase. Updated 2024 Guidance: Full-year revenue guidance: $145-155 million adjusted downward, Positive adjusted EBITDA target pushed to 2025 from prior expectations, Gross margin target maintained at approximately 33%. Key Business Developments. Geographic Expansion: Won Decathlon contract in Belgium for L2 and DC fast chargers, Expanding into Italy and Germany, Achieved FedRAMP In Process status for U.S. government contracts, Selected as official charger provider for New York State. Cost Optimization: Operating expenses fell dramatically down 41% in Q2 versus prior year, cash burn reduced to $12.6 million excluding debt payments.
